description: <each> over a typed component prop, with prop-cell reactivity (§15.13.4 / §42). TodoList iterates its `items: Todo[]` prop via <each in=items key=@.id>. It mounts with 2 rows (alpha, beta); a click on #add appends gamma to the caller's @todos cell, and the component's <each> re-renders to 3 rows in the SAME reactive flush. Regression-lifted from component-each-in-prop-scope.browser.test.js.
rationale: §15.13.4 a component subscribes to the @var references it contains; the <each> over the `items` prop is driven by the caller's reactive @todos cell, so a write to @todos re-renders the component list. §42 keyed <each> reconciles to the new 3-item list. alpha, beta, +gamma.
